hooks.command: curl -s -X POST 'https://api.telegram.org/botREDACTED_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN/sendMessage' -d 'chat_id=REDACTED_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID' -d "text=🤖 Claude Code finished working at $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" >/dev/null 2>&1

curl -s -X POST 'https://api.telegram.org/botREDACTED_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN/sendMessage' -d 'chat_id=REDACTED_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID' -d "text=📢 Claude Code needs your attention at $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" >/dev/null 2>&1

curl -s -X POST 'https://api.telegram.org/botREDACTED_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN/sendMessage' -d 'chat_id=REDACTED_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID' -d "text=🎯 Claude Code subagent completed at $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" >/dev/null 2>&1
